title: LinkedIn CPL holds at $138 while March climbed 12%

connect: Q1 average CPL ran at $174 across the quarter.
body: April audience refresh applied to 4 campaigns covering 62% of paid budget on April 1. Q1 average CPL ran at $174 across the quarter.
trace: LinkedIn CPL efficiency signal against March baseline and Q1 average, with audience refresh timing as the potential driver.
